narrative: Hopes for a de-escalation in the US-Iran conflict pressure the dollar as geopolitical risk premiums unwind — DXY consolidating -0.00% near 2.5-month lows; gold higher +0.53% at $4,719; equities +1.46%; VIX 17.4. USD/JPY holds at 156.39 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry competes with intervention fears and hawkish BoJ bias. NZD/CAD emerges as the week's dominant G8 theme (spread 1.265%) as NZD (+0.632% avg) outpaces a weak CAD (-0.633% avg) following Macklem's energy shock warnings. Watch US Non-Farm Payrolls at 12:30 UTC for the next major directional catalyst.
